creator: mab@red-bean.com
text:
diff -ruN www/aolserver/Makefile www/aolserver+/Makefile
--- www/aolserver/Makefile	Sun Oct 15 19:57:48 2000
+++ www/aolserver+/Makefile	Sun Oct 22 04:27:46 2000
@@ -2,21 +2,26 @@
 # Date created:		13 January 2000
 # Whom:			Matt Braithwaite <mab@red-bean.com>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/www/aolserver/Makefile,v 1.7 2000/10/08 10:23:07 asami Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/www/aolserver/Makefile,v 1.6 2000/07/25 00:59:35 kevlo Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	aolserver
-PORTVERSION=	3.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.1
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.aolserver.com/server/3.0/
-DISTNAME=	aolserver3_0
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.aolserver.com/server/aolserver3_1/
+DISTNAME=	aolserver3_1-source
 
 MAINTAINER=	mab@red-bean.com
 
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/aolserver3_1
+
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
 INSTALL_TARGET=	install INST=${PREFIX}/aolserver
 
+post-extract:
+	find ${WRKSRC} -name CVS | xargs ${RM} -rf
+
 post-install:
 # Headers
 # nsd.h is needed for, e.g., building the Postgres driver
@@ -43,6 +48,6 @@
 			>${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/aolserver.sh ; \
 		${CHMOD} 755 ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/aolserver.sh; \
 	fi
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	@${CAT} ${PKGDIR}/pkg-message
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ruN www/aolserver/distinfo www/aolserver+/distinfo
--- www/aolserver/distinfo	Sat Apr 29 17:19:45 2000
+++ www/aolserver+/distinfo	Sun Oct 22 03:42:56 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (aolserver3_0.tar.gz) = c0385705b54bb1f90e6a4fa6e2c7473c
+MD5 (aolserver3_1-source.tar.gz) = 1cf4c58bec0b9804387d37dc9341434d
diff -ruN www/aolserver/files/aolserver.sh www/aolserver+/files/aolserver.sh
--- www/aolserver/files/aolserver.sh	Sun May 28 20:00:28 2000
+++ www/aolserver+/files/aolserver.sh	Sun Oct 22 03:54:35 2000
@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@
 case "$1" in
 
 start)
-        ${PREFIX}/bin/nsd8x -t ${CONFIG} -u nsadmin -g nsadmin
+        ${PREFIX}/bin/nsd8x -t ${CONFIG} -u nobody -g nobody
         ;;
 
 stop)
-        ${PREFIX}/bin/nsd8x -t ${CONFIG} -u nsadmin -g nsadmin -K
+        ${PREFIX}/bin/nsd8x -t ${CONFIG} -u nobody -g nobody -K
         ;;
 
 *)
diff -ruN www/aolserver/files/patch-aa www/aolserver+/files/patch-aa
--- www/aolserver/files/patch-aa	Sat Apr 29 17:19:46 2000
+++ www/aolserver+/files/patch-aa	Mon Sep 11 23:04:30 2000
@@ -1,20 +1,20 @@
-*** Makefile~	Thu Apr  6 08:58:48 2000
---- Makefile	Sat Apr  8 20:50:41 2000
+*** Makefile+	Mon Sep 11 22:46:01 2000
+--- Makefile	Mon Sep 11 22:46:29 2000
 ***************
 *** 61,68 ****
   	$(CP) -r tcl $(INSTMOD)
   	$(CP) scripts/translate-ini $(INSTBIN)
-  	$(CP) scripts/translate-tcl $(INSTBIN)
-! 	test -f $(INST)/nsd.tcl           \
+  	$(CP) -r include $(INSTINC)
+! 	test -f $(INST)/nsd.tcl \
 ! 		|| $(CP) scripts/nsd.tcl $(INST)
-  	test -f $(INSTSRVPAG)/index.html  \
+  	test -f $(INSTSRVPAG)/index.html \
   		|| $(CP) scripts/index.html $(INSTSRVPAG)
   	@for i in $(ALLDIRS); do \
 --- 61,67 ----
   	$(CP) -r tcl $(INSTMOD)
   	$(CP) scripts/translate-ini $(INSTBIN)
-  	$(CP) scripts/translate-tcl $(INSTBIN)
+  	$(CP) -r include $(INSTINC)
 ! 	$(CP) scripts/nsd.tcl $(INST)/nsd.tcl.sample
-  	test -f $(INSTSRVPAG)/index.html  \
+  	test -f $(INSTSRVPAG)/index.html \
   		|| $(CP) scripts/index.html $(INSTSRVPAG)
   	@for i in $(ALLDIRS); do \
diff -ruN www/aolserver/pkg-plist www/aolserver+/pkg-plist
--- www/aolserver/pkg-plist	Thu Jun  1 09:55:30 2000
+++ www/aolserver+/pkg-plist	Sun Oct 22 04:28:06 2000
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 aolserver/bin/translate-ini
-aolserver/bin/translate-tcl

+aolserver/lib/libnspd.a
+aolserver/lib/libnsthread.a

 aolserver/servers/server1/modules/nsperm/passwd
 aolserver/servers/server1/pages/index.html
+aolserver/include/tclDecls.h
+aolserver/include/Makefile.module
+aolserver/include/ns.h
+aolserver/include/nsextmsg.h
+aolserver/include/nspd.h
+aolserver/include/nsthread.h
+aolserver/include/tcl.h
+aolserver/include/tcl76.h
+aolserver/include/tcl83.h
+aolserver/include/Makefile.global
 aolserver/nsd.tcl.sample
 etc/rc.d/aolserver.sh
 include/aolserver/ns.h
@@ -37,7 +50,6 @@
 include/aolserver/nsthread.h
 include/aolserver/tcl.h
 include/aolserver/tcl76.h
-include/aolserver/tcl82.h
 include/aolserver/tcl83.h
 include/aolserver/tclDecls.h
 include/aolserver/nsd.h
